claims.claim: Any browser • Any platform • One API Resilient • No flaky tests No trade-offs • No limits Browsers run web content belonging to different origins in different processes.
claims.topic: Fast and reliable end-to-end testing for modern web apps | Playwright Python

claims.claim: Playwright module provides a method to launch a browser instance.

Properties chromium This object can be used to launch or connect to Chromium, returning instances of devices Returns a dictionary of devices to be used with Sync Async firefox This object can be used to launch or connect to Firefox, returning instances of request Exposes API that can be used for the Web API testing.
